Home›Services› Executive Security
Service

Executive & Personal
Security

High-profile individuals face targeted cyber threats that standard enterprise security programs do not address. Our practice provides discreet, comprehensive personal cybersecurity advisory for executives, public figures, and their families.

Protecting Your Digital Life

CEOs, board members, public figures, and high-net-worth individuals present unique attack surfaces through their personal devices, accounts, and online presence. Threat actors target executives for financial fraud, corporate espionage, and reputational damage — and most personal security measures are inadequate against sophisticated adversaries.

We deliver the same caliber of protection that Fortune 50 executives receive — tailored to each client’s specific risk profile and delivered with complete discretion.

Capabilities

  • Personal device security audit and hardening across mobile, laptop, and tablet
  • Account security review — email, financial, social media, and cloud storage
  • Stalkerware and spyware detection and removal
  • Dark web monitoring for personal data exposure
  • Travel security briefings and temporary device provisioning
  • Family member security awareness and protection configuration
  • Social engineering defense preparation
  • Privacy management — data broker removal and digital footprint reduction
  • Incident response for personal account compromise

Who We Serve

C-suite executives with significant personal digital exposure. High-net-worth individuals and their families. Public figures and individuals with high-visibility profiles. Individuals navigating high-stakes legal proceedings, divorce, or custody disputes who suspect digital surveillance.

Key Capabilities

  • Device Forensics
  • Stalkerware Detection
  • Account Hardening
  • Dark Web Monitoring
  • Privacy Management
  • Travel Security
  • Family Protection

Confidential by Design

Every engagement is NDA-protected. Your privacy is the entire point.

Private Consultation
